name: Matzos Stuffing for Poultry
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the 4 matzos into small pieces and add 1/2 a cup of cold water. Let them soak up the liquid.
2. In 2 tablespoons schmaltz, cook 1 medium onion until golden. Squeeze excess liquid from the soaked matzo pieces.
3. Mix together the soaked matzos, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 6 prunes, cinnamon, 1/4 cup slivered almonds, and 2 eggs. Combine well.
4. Pour the stuffing into a pan with the cooked onions and stir over moderate heat until the mixture is light and fairly dry.
5. Add 1 tablespoon chopped parsley. Use this mixture to stuff a large chicken and roast as usual.
